(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. THIS CASE WAS HEARD SOLELY ON THE UNDERSTANDING THAT PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE IS IN SAN FR
ANCISCO. IT APPEARS TO THE COURT THAT BOTH CLIENTS LIVE PERMANENTLY IN DALY CITY. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES FOR MEDIATION AND
T LEGAL CUSTODY AND SOLE PHYSICAL CUSTODY WAS AWARDED TO THE MOTHER. THE COURT GRANTED A SIX MONTH RESTRAINING ORDER. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT CONTACT,
EACE OF PETITIONER. RESPONDENT SHALL STAY 100 YARDS AWAY FROM PETITIONER, AND PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE. THE FINANCIAL ISSUES WERE CONTINUED TO

(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. PARTIES WERE SEEN IN FAMILY COURT SERVICES PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THIS MORNING'S CALENDAR. T
HE PARTIES AGREE THAT FATHER WILL PICK UP CHILD EACH AFTERNOON AND MOTHER WILL THEN PICK UP CHILD FROM FATHER'S HOME. ON MONDAY, WEDNESDAYS, AND
EMESTER THE LATE EVENING PICK UP WILL BE BASED ON MOTHER'S CLASS SCHEDULE. THE CHILD WILL ALSO BE IN THE FATHER'S CARE ON ALTERNATE WEEKENDS FORM
FTER SCHOOL THOUGH SATURDAYS AT 4:00 P.M. THANKSGIVING FOUR-DAY WEEKEND TO THE MOTHER. CHINESE HOLIDAYS TO THE MOTHER. THE COURT ORDERED THAT THE
